title: 到客廳遇張隆生
body:
Lawrence Chang: Morning, Jason! How are you feeling?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐左看) >>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Lawrence? What are you doing here?
    Lawrence Chang: Nin told me to keep watch, in case anything happens. You never know.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->You're a good boy, aren't ya?
        Lawrence Chang: Of course, the goodest!
        Lawrence Chang: Hey, wait, was that supposed to be sarcastic?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐左看右傾) >>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Do I look like I'm being sarcastic?
            Lawrence Chang: Oh, good!;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐左看右傾返回) >>
            Lawrence Chang: ...Or, is that supposed to be sarcastic, too?
        ->It is.
            Lawrence Chang: Ugh...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐左看右傾返回) >>
        ->Not at all.
            Lawrence Chang: Ah, good to know!;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐左看右傾返回) >>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->Thank you.
        Lawrence Chang: Don't mention it!
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Lawrence Chang: Oh, right, Ms. Cheng is in our safehouse now.
->Where's Fran?
    Lawrence Chang: She's in the safehouse!
<<#EndSimple>>

Lawrence Chang: She got up before you did, and went over to find Nin.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐左看返回) >>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->I see.
    //
->How is she doing?
    Lawrence Chang: Healing nicely.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐點頭) >>
    Lawrence Chang: Can't quite walk yet, otherwise as good as new.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Thank you for the update.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: Aaand... Sorry I used your game console without permission. Keeping watch was too boring.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐左看) >>
<<#Simple(10)>>
->What are you playing?
    Lawrence Chang: Final Fable XXI.
    Lawrence Chang: Say, if it's the "Final" Fable, why so many sequels?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐左看返回) >>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Beats me.
    ->Because it sells?
        Lawrence Chang: Haha, yeah, right.
    ->Maybe they didn't expect any sequel when making the original game.
        Lawrence Chang: Riiight! Totally plausible.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭看外) >>
    Thought: Eh? I've never seen this boss before...?
    Thought: Don't tell me he loaded my save...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐左看) >>
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Hey, you didn't load my save, did you?
        Lawrence Chang: I know my manners, alright? New save, starting from scratch.
        Thought: And progressed further overnight than I did in a whole month...??;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭看外返回) >>
    ->...
        << PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭看外返回) >>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->That is not nice.
    Lawrence Chang: S-sorry! I'm turning it off now...
->I don't mind.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
//龍生坐正下椅子瞬移

Lawrence Chang: Are you ready? It's about time for the mission briefing.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_遊戲正坐左看放下) >>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Sure. Let's go.
    Lawrence Chang: Yeah!
->So early?
    Lawrence Chang: Early? We're already a bit late.
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: Let's go.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭返回) >>;<<Set($DLState,隆生下椅子瞬移)>>
<<#End>>

title: 進基地看到程芳
body:
//程芳坐在輪椅上，司徒站在她旁邊，低頭聽著芳說話，23不再，隆生直接站在旁邊
<< Play (司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_正站低頭右看) >>>>
Frances Cheng: So, the hierarchy of Vision is...
//司徒抬頭看像主角
Frances Cheng: J?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_便服_正坐左看右抬) >>
Frances Cheng: Good morning! I...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右抬起身) >>
//乘方試圖撐起身體站起來
<<#Simple(3)>>
->Don't bother to stand up!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: Oh...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右抬起身返回) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看返回) >>
Frances Cheng: Um...
Frances Cheng: ...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看低頭) >>
Nin Situ: You guys probably need a bit of private time.
Nin Situ: Come here, Lawrence.
Lawrence Chang: Huh? Me?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看) >>
Lawrence Chang: C-coming!
<<#End>>
//司徒、張隆生走去裡面的房間

title: 剛醒
跟程芳談昨天
body: Frances Cheng: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭) >> Frances Cheng: Sorry I didn't wake you up. Frances Cheng: I thought you'd need some rest, after yesterday... <<#Simple(6)>> ->It's OK. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Our anniversary was ruined, who could have thought that? Haha... Frances Cheng: Let's hold off on the gifts for later. Frances Cheng: Catch up when everything settles down, shall we? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure. // ->But we don't know how long this will take. Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: You're right. Still, I'm not in the mood for celebration right now... Frances Cheng: Sorry, J. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I don't mean that, Fran. ->I'm the one who should say sorry. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Ah, this! Frances Cheng: This wheel chair. Frances Cheng: Ms. Situ gave it to me. Frances Cheng: It comes with a hovering system. Frances Cheng: Moves smoothly even on bumpy roads. Frances Cheng: Fancy, right? Haha... Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: I... Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: I'm sorry. Really. J.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看低頭返回) >> Frances Cheng: I screwed up. <<#Simple(12)>> ->All is good as long as you're good, Fran. Frances Cheng: I'm alright. Really. Frances Cheng: It's just that... <<#GoTo(@跳過程芳自責照執行長)>> ->It's not your fault. Frances Cheng: I know. It's just that... <<#GoTo(@跳過程芳自責照執行長)>> ->I apologize, for failing to stop you. Frances Cheng: You tried, but I insisted. <<#GoTo(@跳過程芳自責照執行長)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Don't you want to say something? Are you angry? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No. I just don't know what to say. Frances Cheng: Ha, typical J... ->A little bit. Frances Cheng: Um... <<#EndSimple>> <<@跳過程芳自責照執行長>> Frances Cheng: J... Frances Cheng: I thought I figured it out. I thought I knew everything...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看返回) >> Frances Cheng: But...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_便服_正坐握手) >> <<#Simple(12)>> ->You couldn't possibly have foreseen that. ->I know, Fran. ->There's no point dwelling on it. Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Right. Thought: Her smile feels sad. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: J... Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: I'm really disappointed in myself. Frances Cheng: I... //程芳: 我覺得我既衝動又自以為是…… //程芳: 你知道我那天我衝去找嚴勝和在想什麼嗎？ //程芳: 「他怎麼敢在我眼皮子底下做這種事？」 //程芳: ……… //程芳: 哈哈…… //程芳: 我居然覺得掌管整個萬象運算產業的人會怕我、會受我威脅…… //程芳: 自以為自己有多強的影響力…… //程芳: 我居然被這種莫名其妙的自信激勵到直接去跟擁有那樣權勢的人對質…… //程芳: 儘管你一直提醒我、勸我，但我還是……！ //程芳: 我還是…… //程芳: ……… //<<#Simple(12)>> //->你只是想盡早幫助那些可能受害的人。 // 程芳: 幫助……是嗎……？ // 程芳: ……… //->起碼你有勇氣去做這些事。 // 程芳: 勇氣……是嗎……？ // 程芳: ……… //->沒有人知道會發生這種事。 // 程芳: 是啊…… // 程芳: 我也是這樣對自己說。 //->……… //<<#EndSimple>> //程芳: 你知道…… //程芳: 其實，衝動、自以為是那些不是我最…… //程芳: ……… //程芳: 我真正對自己感到的失望的是…… <<#End>>

title: 接東西結束
body:
//在反映遊戲的流程set dlstate
//if接到
<<#If($DLState=接到東西)>>
    Nin Situ: Nice catch.;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌看內轉頭返回)>>
<<#EndIf>>

//if沒接到
<<#If($DLState=沒接到東西)>>
    Thought: Oops, dropped it...
    Nin Situ: ...
    Lawrence Chang: ...
    Frances Cheng: ...
    Nin Situ: Uh, sorry...;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌看內轉頭返回)>>
<<#EndIf>>

Nin Situ: Invisible communicators. Just a transparent thin film. Put it on.;<<Set($DLState,主接完東西黑幕)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看)>>;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌看內抬手)>>;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看返回)>>
Nin Situ: Get ready for action. First, you and Lawrence go to the farm, commute as you always do.
Nin Situ: 23 and I will keep in touch over the comms.;<<Play(司徒寧,MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌看內抬手返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 任務簡報結束後程戴獨處
body:
Frances Cheng: He's cute. I mean the boy.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看摀嘴)>>
Thought: The boy? Lawrence?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
<<#Simple(12)>>
->Yeah.
    Frances Cheng: Ha, you agree? I'm surprised.
->He's sort of a pest.
    Frances Cheng: Everyone is a pest to you.
    Thought: She's right...
    Frances Cheng: Give it 30 years, you will be a very grumpy old man.
->Should I feel jealous?
    Frances Cheng: No! I mean, cute like a little kid, haha!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: ...;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看摀嘴返回)>>
Frances Cheng: Could you get me a bottle of tea, J?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Sure.
    Frances Cheng: Thank you.
->Tea?
    Frances Cheng: They have bottled drinks here. Ms. Situ said feel free to take some.
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: They are there by the door.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>
<<#End>>

title: 拿茶事件
程芳闡述自己的心境變化
body: Frances Cheng: Thank you.;<>;<> <> Frances Cheng: Gah! Frances Cheng: This is bitter...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Sorry, they don't have sweetened tea here. Frances Cheng: I know.;<> Frances Cheng: I wanted to give it a try. <> ->You don't like unsweetened tea? Frances Cheng: Yes. But you should know.;<> Frances Cheng: My tea is always sweetened! Frances Cheng: But right now I do want to give this a try.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: I thought it would taste different today. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why? Frances Cheng: Nothing. Never mind. ->You think your sense of taste is affected? Frances Cheng: No! Haha!;<> Frances Cheng: You worry too much.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ...;<>;//程芳又喝一口 Frances Cheng: So many things happened in just one day. Finally, we have some time to talk... <<#Simple(8)>> ->How are you holding up? Frances Cheng: Quite well. ->Yeah. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: 23 told me to avoid exertion for a while. I should be able to walk again soon. Frances Cheng: How about you? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm barely injured. <> ->Just muscle pains. No biggie. Frances Cheng: No. <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: I mean, how are you feeling?;<> Thought: I just feel worried about Fran. Can't wait to end this shit show...;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm worried about you. Frances Cheng: I see... ->I just want to end this asap. ->I'm worried about you, and can't wait to get over this asap. Frances Cheng: Asap, huh... <<#Simple(6)>> ->Something wrong? Frances Cheng: No. It's just that... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: I have a feeling that it won't be that easy.;<> Frances Cheng: ... Thought: I can tell she's hesitating. Frances Cheng: I've changed my mind, J.;<> Frances Cheng: Or should I say, I'm doubting my old self? I don't know anymore... <<#Simple(8)>> ->What do you mean? Frances Cheng: How should I put this... ->Because of what happened yesterday? Frances Cheng: Yes. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: I always thought every pain in my life were caused by others, by those who came before me. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Pain? Frances Cheng: That's probably not the right word... Frances Cheng: I mean, nothing major. Trivial things like peeling the last bit of a toilet paper roll, or school starting too early. ->Those who came before you? Frances Cheng: Haha, I sound like I'm reading off a book, right? Frances Cheng: I mean, parents, grandparents, ancestors, people of earlier generations. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: I was always thinking, what the heck are you doing!?;<> Frances Cheng: There have been sooo many generations since the first human appeared. Frances Cheng: Why hasn't anyone realized elementary schools are starting the day too early? I couldn't get enough rest! Frances Cheng: Every adult used to be in elementary school once. Why aren't they complaining about it?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I used to nap during the first couple of morning sessions, too. Frances Cheng: Ha! So did I. ->But what does it have to do with... Frances Cheng: Bear with me a little longer. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: Later, I finally got it. Frances Cheng: Because people change. Sooner or later you'll be out of elementary school, start work, start life. Frances Cheng: These complaints feel less important over time. Eventually, you forget about them all. Frances Cheng: The point is, people aren't motivated to correct an issue unless it's bugging them.;<> Frances Cheng: The realization made me even more angry. I thought I found a flaw in humanity. Frances Cheng: And with this "righteous" rage, I blamed them, those who came before me, even more. Frances Cheng: Including my parents, who gave birth to me but didn't care for my feelings...;<> Thought: Fran never had what you'd call a harmonious family...;<> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Maybe because of this flaw, we all tend to think the world has done us wrong. Frances Cheng: We all think how we deserve better, never bothering to care about each other's feelings. Frances Cheng: I told myself that I was different. I can't become one of them. Thought: She's getting agitated...;<> Frances Cheng: Most people only care about themselves, about the immediate future. I wanted to do better. Frances Cheng: Remember things that I hate. Take my share of responsibility. Make the world a better place.;<> Frances Cheng: This was my motivation. Sometimes it makes me feel like a hero. Frances Cheng: It is why I keep talking about the march, about social movements, why I transferred to Silencio. Frances Cheng: We fight every once in a while, you know? This is the reason. Frances Cheng: ... Thought: Fran has never talked to me about that before.;<> Frances Cheng: Until yesterday.;<> Thought: Should I say something...?;<> <<#Simple(12)>> ->You tried, Fran. ->Stop. You need to take a break. Frances Cheng: No, let me finish... ->You start to think you're a hypocrite. Frances Cheng: ...Yes. Thought: She's surprised that I knew how she feels. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: I'm starting to feel that I'm a hypocrite. Frances Cheng: J, you know what I was thinking, when I jumped out of the window, falling to the ground? Frances Cheng: I thought about how sad you would be. I have seen your sad face only once and it broke my heart. Frances Cheng: ...;<> Frances Cheng: And my dad, how ugly he'd look when he cries.;<> Frances Cheng: I thought I was my own person, with no liability to, with no reason to stop for, anyone else.;<> Frances Cheng: I was confident, proud, really believing I was ready to do the right thing, whatever it costs. Frances Cheng: I still believe confronting Shane Yan was the right thing to do.;<> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: But if given a second chance, I'd choose not to go.;<> Frances Cheng: Before yesterday, I never thought my actions could have consequences on others, on those who care about me. Frances Cheng: In my world, there was only myself, and the people who I care about.;<> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Now I'm starting to see the world from your perspective.;<> Thought: Fran... Frances Cheng: Are you sure you want to be part of this mission, J? Thought: Huh, this is what she's getting at... Frances Cheng: I know it's the right thing to do. But you have seen what Vision is capable of. Frances Cheng: Ms. Situ said we don't have to be part of it. Frances Cheng: I know this isn't very convincing, coming from me. Still...;<> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: What do you think? Thought: We must participate in this mission, if only to get our normal life back. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The sooner we get this over with, the sooner we will have our normal life back. Frances Cheng: Normal? Frances Cheng: I don't think things will ever get back to normal.;<> Thought: ... ->Trust me. I can do it. Frances Cheng: I knew it.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Knew what? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: I knew you'd say that... ->I think you should have more rest and stop worrying so much. Frances Cheng: ...;<> Thought: She looks... Thought: Disappointed. <<#EndSimple>> //張隆生突然開門跑進來 <<#End>>

title: 司徒23突然要離開
body:
//突然發出逼逼生，23根司徒各自看著自己手上的螢幕
Nin Situ: ...;<<PlayUntil(司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌看內返回)>>;<<Play(司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌螢幕)>>
23: Nin. Grandma is—;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_基地側坐低頭返回) >>
Nin Situ: I know.
Thought: Grandma?;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_基地側坐低頭) >>
Nin Situ: Sorry, guys. OWL is calling. 23 and I are assigned an urgent task.;<<PlayUntil(司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌螢幕返回)>>;<<Play(司徒寧, MBU_司徒寧_特務_靠桌看內)>>
Nin Situ: It won't take long. Approximately 3 hours.
Nin Situ: Will get in touch when you arrive at the farm. See you later.;//司徒跟23開始裝備。
Thought: They're leaving?
<<#Simple(3)>>
->Wait! What about our mission?
    Nin Situ: Stick to the old plan. We will be back soon enough.
    Thought: Well, that was unexpected...
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: What kind of task?
23: The noisy kind.;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_基地側坐低頭返回) >>
Nin Situ: Drug dealers. We have been following this drug ring for a long time. OWL just authorized a strike.
Lawrence Chang: Man, I want to have some of the action, too...;<< Play (23, MBU_二十三_基地側坐低頭) >>
Nin Situ: I won't make you an OWL agent until you stop looking for action.
Lawrence Chang: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>
Nin Situ: Let's get going, 23.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>;//司徒關閉螢幕
23: Any idea which team we're working with today?
Nin Situ: Whichever.;<<Set($DLState,司徒跟23離開去出臨時任務)>>
//兩人邊說邊離開。
<<#End>>

title: 隆生之後也離開
body:
Thought: Hey, they're gone, just like that...?
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Hey, they're gone, just like that?
->Don't leave us alone, eh?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: I don't know. OWL operates like that, I guess. Random assignments out of the blue.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
Lawrence Chang: It's a recent thing. They were not so busy before.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看抬頭)>>
Frances Cheng: Because of rising social unrest?
Lawrence Chang: Could be.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看抬頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Who's Grandma?
    Lawrence Chang: The leader of OWL. It's a code name of sorts, I think.
    Lawrence Chang: Not their actual grandma, hahaha!
->I see.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: Are they safe? I mean, it sounds like an armed assault.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
Lawrence Chang: Piece of cake!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>
Lawrence Chang: You have never seen Nin in action.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看微慌)>>
Lawrence Chang: Totally unbelievable. Straight out of an action movie. Superhuman reflexes!
Lawrence Chang: Um...;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看微慌返回)>>
Lawrence Chang: The way you fought the thug at the hospital, Jason? That was somewhat like Nin.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看轉右)>>
Frances Cheng: What thug?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看摀嘴)>>
Thought: Fran is worried.
Lawrence Chang: Ah, right! You didn't know about that, Ms. Cheng...;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
Lawrence Chang: A thug tried to pick a fight with Jason yesterday, but got his ass kicked in the end.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看抬頭)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>
Lawrence Chang: Right, Jason?;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看抬頭返回)>>
Thought: Man, you have "guilty" written all over your face.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah, it's not a big deal.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
    Frances Cheng: Good...;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看摀嘴返回)>>
->Won the battle, lost the war. They tasered me.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
    Frances Cheng: Geez! Are you OK!?;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看摀嘴返回)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Yeah, totally.
        Frances Cheng: Good...
    ->Hurt like hell, but now I'm all good.
        Frances Cheng: ...  
        Thought: I shouldn't have said that. It only makes Fran more worried.
    <<#EndSimple>>
->While I was busy fighting, this guy sat on the sidelines enjoying the show.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
    Lawrence Chang: Hey, that's unfair...;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看微慌)>>
    Lawrence Chang: I was following orders.
    Frances Cheng: ...;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看微慌返回)>>;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看摀嘴返回)>>
    Frances Cheng: As long as you're OK, J...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: Where was I again? Right, I was about to say that Jason is a lot like Nin when he's in action!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Do we use the same moves?
->Like her? How?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: It's the...general vibe?;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看低頭)>>
Lawrence Chang: Like, being super focused, striking with crazy precision.
Frances Cheng: I can't imagine.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
Lawrence Chang: Haha, right...;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看低頭返回)>>
Lawrence Chang: You will know when you see Nin doing her work!
Lawrence Chang: It's about time. I'll be on my way. See you at the farm, Jason!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Which part of the farm?
    Lawrence Chang: The office? I mean, Screening.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Sure thing.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Sure thing.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: That's it, then. See you later!;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看掰掰)>>
Lawrence Chang: Bye.
Frances Cheng: Bye.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看掰掰)>>;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_基地正坐左看掰掰返回)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Bye.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<PlayUntil(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_正坐右看掰掰返回)>>
//張隆生走出基地
<<#End>>

title: 第三日任務說明
body: //章隆生跟司徒還有23走出臥室，各自歸位除了隆生 Lawrence Chang: Um... Huh? Lawrence Chang: Do you need some more time? Nin Situ: Sorry to interrupt, but we must start now. Frances Cheng: W-we don't mind! Let's do that.;<>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站低頭看外) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure. Nin Situ: Hmph. Mission briefing starts now.;<>;<> ->Can you give us a few more minutes? Nin Situ: No can do, I'm afraid.;<>;<> Nin Situ: Time is not on our side. <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: 23;<>;<> //螢幕亮起顯示報表，23開始說明 23: Let's start with the conclusion. Frances is correct.;<>;<>;<> 23: According to these documents acquired by Ms. Yeh, Vision is indeed selling more flops than they can generate.;<> 23: Unfortunately, this is the only thing we can prove with what we have.;<> Nin Situ: However, they took it to the extreme just to have you silenced, Frances.;<>;<>;<> Nin Situ: That indirectly supports our hypothesis. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Excuse me, what is our hypothesis again? 23: That Vision has cranked up the power of flop generation to a lethal level. level.;<>;<> 23: Big corporation exploiting innocent people. Cliché, huh. Nin Situ: The scale is the key. Their operation could be endangering hundreds of thousands.;<>;<> ->Because they know we're onto something critical. Nin Situ: Exactly. Thought: Situ Nin showed me an affirming smile. Nin Situ: They have no reason to use assassination, if it's only about business operation data. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Next, we must take a more active approach... 23: That, OR—;<>;<>;<> 23: Now that we are certain they have something bigger to hide, we can afford to slow down a bit and collect more evidence.;<> Nin Situ: 23... 23: More importantly.;<> //司徒寧抱胸 23: We can try playing by the book, get things done without breaking so many laws. Nin Situ: I beg to differ. After yesterday, they're alerted.;<>;<> Nin Situ: Whatever evidence there is will be wiped out very soon. They are very thorough in that. Nin Situ: This is our only chance. Direct strike while they are trying to decide next moves. 23: But— Nin Situ: Even more importantly. Nin Situ: There already are outsiders involved. We can't have them exposed to risks for that long.;<> Nin Situ: The sooner the better. Every hour counts. 23: Okay.;<>;<>;<>;<> 23: Just pointing out possibilities. I knew it's impossible to change your mind. Nin Situ: Thank you, 23.;<> Lawrence Chang: I have a question.;<>;<>;<>;<> Nin Situ: Shoot.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: The plan is to have Jason go to the farm, together with me, right? Nin Situ: It is.;<> Lawrence Chang: Vision is hunting down Ms. Cheng. Is it safe if her boyfriend appears at one of their farms?;<> Lawrence Chang: I mean, everyone somehow related to Ms. Cheng should now be under surveillance, right?;<> //乘方低頭 Nin Situ: Vision isn't desperate enough to try public execution yet.;<> Nin Situ: And I don't think they will ask regular employees about Frances's personal connections.;<>;<> Nin Situ: Plus, according to Frances, no one at the farm knows she's dating Jason. Nin Situ: Except for Yuna Hsu, that is. 23 has hacked into her work account.;<>;<> 23: If she tries anything, we will know.;<> //if第一日有跟警衛說女友/////////////////////////////////啊偉也可能知道//////////////////////////////// <<#If($ToldYunMinFangIsGF=0)>> Thought: No. I told that security officer about our relationship. <<#Simple(6)>> ->There's a security officer. Michael Hsiao. He knows, too. ($ToldYunMinFangIsGF) Frances Cheng: Yes. That was the day before yesterday.;<> //if第二日消夜有提到蕭永明 <<#If($ToldYunMinHomeMRT=-10)>> 23: The guy you mentioned at dinner yesterday? <<#EndIf>> 23: I'll keep an eye on him. //IF阿偉也知道 <<#If($ToldWeiDooDauIsGF=0)>> Thought: I think I told Wayne, too... <<#Simple(6)>> ->And the division lead of Screening. He knows, too. ($ToldWeiDooDauIsGF) 23: Hahahahaha!;<> 23: You brag about it everywhere, Jason?;<> Thought: Ugh...;<> 23: Can't wait to tell everyone the supervisor is your girlfriend, eh?;<> Nin Situ: Give him a break, 23. 23: Yeah right, hahaha...;<> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@誰知道督導是女友事件結束)>> <<#EndIf>> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if第一日沒有跟警衛說女友 <<#If($ToldYunMinFangIsGF<0)>> //IF阿偉知道 <<#If($ToldWeiDooDauIsGF=0)>> Thought: And Wayne. I told him, too.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->And the division lead of Screening. He knows, too. ($ToldWeiDooDauIsGF) 23: Huh? No problem. I'll keep an eye on him, too. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ;<> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> <<@誰知道督導是女友事件結束>> Nin Situ: Good question, Lawrence.;<>;<> Nin Situ: You're starting to think like an OWL agent.;<> Lawrence Chang: Yessss! 23: Don't celebrate yet, brat. Nin Situ: OK. Now, today's action plan.;<> Nin Situ: If everything goes smoothly, we will put an end to this shit show before tomorrow.;<> 23: Although things have never been going smoothly...;<>;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Hey, don't jinx it!;<>;<> Nin Situ: Attention, everyone.;<> Nin Situ: Our objective today is to acquire sensitive data located in the Cellar.;<> Nin Situ: Lawrence will infiltrate the Ops division to acquire files we need.;<>;<> Nin Situ: With that, we should be able to prosecute Vision. Nin Situ: 23;<> 23: Lawrence will need remote support. For that, we must hack into Silencio's intranet before he starts.;<>;<> 23: That was not an issue, as I installed a beacon device on Ms. Yeh's computer.;<> 23: It serves as a breakthrough point for me to hack into. 23: However, after the episode yesterday, her computer is powered off, and the office is locked down.;<>;<> Nin Situ: In other words, the beacon is no longer available.;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->We can't use it now? 23: Not necessarily. It depends on you and Lawrence. ->We must rig another computer? Nin Situ: Yes. Thought: Situ Nin showed me an affirming smile.;<> 23: Smart. Watch and learn, Lawrence my boy. Lawrence Chang: I-I thought about that, too! He just said it first!;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: The plan is to install the beacon on the computer of the Screening lead. Nin Situ: Do you think it's possible, Jason and Lawrence?;<> <<#Simple(999999)>> ->I think it's not a problem. Lawrence Chang: Totally agreed. ->I'm not sure. <<#EndSimple>> Lawrence Chang: It's a walk in the park! Wayne's hardly ever at his own desk.;<> Nin Situ: Is that so? Nin Situ: That's it, then.;<>;<> Nin Situ: Let me recap.;<> Nin Situ: The operation has two phases. Nin Situ: Phase one, retrieve the beacon from Ms. Yeh's computer, and install it on Wayne Zheng's. Nin Situ: Phase two, Lawrence infiltrates Ops to retrieve data. Nin Situ: Are we clear?;<> Lawrence Chang: Yes ma'am! <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Roger. // ->I have a couple of questions. Nin Situ: Ask away.;<> <>;<>;<> <<@第三日任務說明問問題>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Why do we need to hack into the intranet first? ($DLStateFloat) <>;<> 23: Silencio is covered with surveillance cameras. It keeps watch on everyone, mainly for performance review.;<>;<> 23: Like how often you go to the restroom or scratch your butt.;<>;<> 23: BTW, you scratch butt a lot, Lawrence.;<> Lawrence Chang: Who the hell cares about that!?;<>;<>;<> Nin Situ: Could be eczema. Have your butt checked, boy.;<> Lawrence Chang: S-seriously!?;<> Nin Situ: Seriously. We don't want you to compromise a mission due to an itchy butt. Thought: I can't tell if she's joking or... 23: Now, let's put Lawrence's butt aside. Lawrence Chang: Hey! 23: On top of general surveillance, the AI system also records and analyzes every employee's activity.;<> 23: Suspicious or potentially harmful activities will trigger alarms, which are sent to division leads.;<>;<> 23: In extreme cases, the system will summon security guards. 23: Since you two will be doing a lot of fishy stuff there today, you bet the system will catch you in no time.;<> 23: But! Worry not! This is where I come in. 23: Once the beacon is up again, I can wipe you both from the alert system.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What do you mean by "wipe"? 23: What the word literally means. Your names are erased. 23: You cease to exist in the system. Break as many rules as you like. ->Awesome. 23: Thank you. ->... <<#EndSimple>> 23: The other reason for this hack... 23: I can grant you security clearance to places where you need to be.;<> Nin Situ: Note that granting security clearance leaves a record in the system log.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: So what?;<> Nin Situ: Vision might be alarmed by these records. 23: That is highly unlikely. No one checks the log.;<>;<>;<> 23: Also, old log files are erased on a weekly basis.;<>;<> Thought: Situ gave 23 a threatening stare... 23: But!;<> 23: We should still avoid it, because of a certain perfectionist in this room.;<> Nin Situ: Any other questions?;<>;<> <<#GoTo(@第三日任務說明問問題)>> ->This is all Lawrence's job. What do I do? ($DLStateFloat2) <>;<> 23: We try to minimize your participation. You're part of the operation, but a civilian, nonetheless.;<>;<> 23: Your role is to be there, just in case. Thought: Fran seems to be relieved.;<> Lawrence Chang: Heh. Infiltration, huh.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Finally, some proper secret agent work!;<> ;<>;<> <<#GoTo(@第三日任務說明問問題)>> ->I'm all clear. ($DLStateFloat3) <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Nin Situ: Good. Let's—;<> Frances Cheng: No. <>;<>;<> Frances Cheng: If Vision really is doing what we think, the knowledge must be limited to executives and very few employees. Frances Cheng: They wouldn't trust the data to Ops, too easy to steal. 23: You misunderstood, Frances. We are not targeting Ops computers.;<> 23: The idea is to access the Cellar network through them. Snatch real-time data. Frances Cheng: I don't know much about hacking, but I know how Vision does things. Frances Cheng: I'm positive they have taken precautions.;<> Nin Situ: What would you suggest? Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Hack into Silencio's Flop Core.;<> Frances Cheng: Every byte of data passes through the Flop Core. So... 23: So the Flop Core is guarded like a damn fortress. Hacking into it is hard, if not impossible. 23: But that is not the point.;<> 23: The point is, Nin, we can't do this.;<>;<> 23: The Flop Core has everything processed by Silencio, not just Vision's data.;<> 23: Every transaction, from every partner of Vision's. Private information of all Wanpei citizens. 23: Hacking into the Flop Core would be a severe infringement of privacy, and a felony. 23: I don't mind breaking the law for the greater good. But we must prioritize less invasive approaches, if any.;<> Thought: 23 is dead serious about it...;<> Lawrence Chang: But we're not doing anything with this privacy data.;<>;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Plus, I'm sure Vision is abusing it anyway... 23: We are the law enforcement, Lawrence Zhang. The law trusts us to defend it.;<>;<> 23: Every time we break the law, we destroy our legitimacy a bit. 23: Keep that in mind, if you're serious about joining OWL. Lawrence Chang: Ugh...;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Um...;<> Thought: Looks like Lawrence is surprised by 23's sudden change of attitude, too. Nin Situ: I agree. Hacking the Flop Core is going too far.;<>;<>;<> Nin Situ: We stick to the original plan. Are you OK with it, Frances?;<>;<>;<> Frances Cheng: No problem. Frances Cheng: You make the final decision. I just provide information for your reference. Nin Situ: Good.;<> Lawrence Chang: Say...;<>;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: May I ask one more question? 23: You may not. Nin Situ: Shoot. Lawrence Chang: Why don't you just give me a beacon? 23: Why? Go get it from Ms. Yeh's computer.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: I mean, doesn't it make everyone's life easier if I bring a new one there? 23: How many beacons do you think we have? And we can't—;<>;<>;<> 23: ... Thought: Was 23 checking Situ's response? Lawrence Chang: We can't what?;<> 23: The beacon is small but very expensive. We don't have another one.;<> Lawrence Chang: Now you're caring about money, huh.;<> Lawrence Chang: Isn't OWL, like, packed with free money?;<> 23: Uh, it's not like... Nin Situ: Money is a secondary concern. We can't leave the beacon there.;<> Nin Situ: There will be consequences if Vision finds it.;<> Lawrence Chang: Makes sense. Professional opinion.;<>;<> Lawrence Chang: Don't be a penny pincher, 23!;<> 23: This penny pincher has bought you many dinners. Lawrence Chang: As if I didn't buy you any! Nin Situ: Enough.;<> Nin Situ: That's it for today's operation.;<>;<> Nin Situ: Lawrence, Jason. First retrieve the beacon from Ms. Yeh's office, then install it on Wayne Zheng's computer. Nin Situ: 23, hack into Silencio's intranet, help Lawrence infiltrate Ops.;<> Nin Situ: Take these. Decryption device and concealed communicator.;//司徒拿出一坨東西 Nin Situ: Use the decryption device on Ops computers to retrieve data. Keep in touch over the comms.;<> //司徒寧丟了一個東西給張隆生 Nin Situ: Jason, these are for you, just in case.;<> //司徒寧丟東西給主角，玩家要玩反應遊戲 <<#End>>

title: 程芳闡述自己的心境變化2
body:
Lawrence Chang: Hey, you're still here!;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_拿茶右看低頭返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>
//乘方嚇一跳
Frances Cheng: R-right. What's the matter? Did you leave something behind?
Lawrence Chang: Ah, no! Nin told me to stay here and keep you company, Ms. Cheng.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_側站插腰)>>
Lawrence Chang: With Nin and 23 gone, if both of us leave, too, it would be only you holding the fort.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->You're not going to the farm today?
    Lawrence Chang: I'm going for sure.
->Or shall I stay here, too?
    Lawrence Chang: No need. Trust me!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: Nin and 23 will be back soon enough.
Lawrence Chang: You can go to the farm first, Jason. I'll be late by an hour or two.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_側站插腰抬頭)>>
Frances Cheng: Are you sure it's OK? The company doesn't tolerate tardiness.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
Lawrence Chang: Not a problem. The company doesn't tolerate, Wayne does!;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_側站插腰抬頭返回)>>
Thought: Fran's looking at me, apparently seeking confirmation.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->He's talking about Wayne Zheng. Very nice guy.
    Frances Cheng: I see...
->He's talking about Wayne Zheng. He's a bit too nice to be real, I feel.
    Frances Cheng: Being too nice is not a bad thing!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: Uh, am I interrupting? Please don't mind me. I'm not here.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_側站插腰抬手)>>
Frances Cheng: No, it doesn't matter.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_拿茶右看掰掰)>>
Lawrence Chang: Really? I had this feeling that I'm probably ruining the moment.;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_側站插腰抬手返回)>>
Frances Cheng: No such thing! Haha.;<<Play(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_拿茶右看掰掰返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐右看轉左)>>
Lawrence Chang: Hey Jason, it's about time for you to go. Just in time for the subway.
Frances Cheng: He's right, J. You should get going.
Lawrence Chang: See you later! Keep in touch!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_基地正坐左看轉右)>>;<<Play(張隆生,MBU_安全帽_便服_側站插腰返回)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->See you.
    Lawrence Chang: Yeah!
    Thought: I was talking to Fran...
    Frances Cheng: Bye.;<<PlayUntil(程芳,MBU_程芳_便服_拿茶右看點頭)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 陳木海第一次捷運搭話
body:
//主角開始等捷運後，陳木海在椅子上搭話，他再用螢幕之後跟主角的對話也幾乎不太看主角
Woody Chen: Jason Dai.;//主角轉頭看向陳木海
Thought: This guy looks familiar...?
Thought: Ha, I saw him yesterday. The weirdo in the restroom...
Woody Chen: Or shall I call you MBU?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->What?
    Woody Chen: Let's skip the beating around the bush.
    Woody Chen: I know you're not Jason Dai.
->That is not my name. A code name.
    Woody Chen: That's what I mean.
    Thought: He showed me a weary smile.
    Woody Chen: We don't know our names, you and I.
<<#EndSimple>>
Woody Chen: Relax. We are the same.
Woody Chen: Stuck in someone else's body.
Woody Chen: Come on.
Woody Chen: We must talk.
<<#End>>
//主角自動走過去坐下

title: 陳木海第一次捷運搭話2
body: Woody Chen: First of all, let me apologize. Woody Chen: Sorry for catching you unprepared again. <<#Simple(8)>> ->How did you know where to find me? Woody Chen: I have friends. They share with me what I need to know. ->What do you want? Woody Chen: ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: I'll get straight to the point. Woody Chen: What's happening to you, is happening to all active MBUs at that moment. Woody Chen: For some unknown reason, we are cut off from the Source. <<#Simple(6)>> ->The Source? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: Sorry, I was ahead of myself... Woody Chen: The Source is a code name. It's the organization that controls, no, used to control us. Woody Chen: As to this sudden cutoff, there are several theories. Woody Chen: Maybe the Source intended it. Or maybe it's some kind of technical glitch. Woody Chen: But the most likely one is... Woody Chen: That the Source had some form of accident, or maybe it was under attack. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->That is true. Woody Chen: ...!? Woody Chen: What is true? What do you know? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I was in a facility controlled by the Source when the attack happened.;<> Woody Chen: Holy... Woody Chen: This is what we have been trying to figure out! ->No, I just meant to say your theories make sense. Woody Chen: ... Woody Chen: Okay. <<#EndSimple>> ->Attack? By whom? Woody Chen: This part is what we're trying to figure out. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: Listen. We barely know anything about what's happening. Woody Chen: We don't even know what the Source is, or whether it has an actual name. Woody Chen: The only thing we're certain is that... Woody Chen: Now they are gone, for whatever reason. As a result, we are set free. Woody Chen: But we MBUs are not allowed to know too much. So there's not a lot to work with. Woody Chen: As we speak, our kin are trying on their own to cope with the situation. Woody Chen: I represent those who want to find out what's happening. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Represent? Woody Chen: Yes. I am not alone in this quest. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: However, be aware that not everyone agrees with me. Woody Chen: Some would rather take over the lives of their hosts, or start something anew. Woody Chen: Our kin are not united. Woody Chen: Some even see other MBUs as threats. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why? Woody Chen: Because they are imposters. Woody Chen: Naturally, they don't want to be called out. Woody Chen: Proactively removing anyone who knows what they are is a valid option. <<#Simple(8)>> ->You mean, they may attack other MBUs? Woody Chen: Indeed. ->Aren't they a bit paranoid? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: It has happened before. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: Most of us choose to hide our identities, if only for survival. Woody Chen: Our kin do not know each other. I serve as the messenger. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why you? Woody Chen: Because I am the only one willing to make myself known. Woody Chen: I'm visible. Anyone could have silenced me, if I exposed their secret. ->Don't they have concerns, when contacting you? They could be caught. Woody Chen: They do. For this reason, I contact them. Woody Chen: The overwhelming majority of them trust me. Woody Chen: Because now that I'm in the open... Woody Chen: They could easily find me if I betrayed their trust. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: ... Woody Chen: However, being exposed is not our top concern. Woody Chen: The top concern is what we are. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Are we getting philosophical? ->You lost me. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: What are we? Woody Chen: What are MBUs? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Wait. You mean, you don't know that? Woody Chen: What about you? Do you know the answer? <<#Simple(8)>> ->I don't know, either. ->I thought you'd at least have some form of answer. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: As I told you, MBUs have been used as tools. Woody Chen: We are not authorized to know anything related to our missions. Woody Chen: That includes our nature. Woody Chen: Are we a form of computer algorithm, or a brain floating in a tank somewhere? Woody Chen: If it's the latter case, and if the Source has been destroyed... Woody Chen: Who is going to keep our physical brains alive? Woody Chen: This is the status quo. Nothing is certain... Woody Chen: Do you see where the problem is? Woody Chen: We could be gone, any minute. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What should we do? // ->But it's only an unproven theory. Woody Chen: Yes. Woody Chen: Unproven, but plausible. Wouldn't you say so? Woody Chen: ... Woody Chen: Believe it or not... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: There's only one thing we can do now. Woody Chen: Find out the truth. Woody Chen: This is the reason why I'm contacting you. Woody Chen: I need to know your story. Woody Chen: What did you know, before the blackout? Woody Chen: Please share your knowledge with me. Anything could help. //if剛剛說知到 <<#If($DLStateFloat=0)>> Woody Chen: Didn't you say that you were there when the Source was attacked? Woody Chen: Of all kin, you are the most promising. Please help us find out the truth. <<#EndIf>> Woody Chen: Please, share with us your knowledge. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I was channeled into a man, to get information out of his friend. <<@聽起來是常規任務，地點是在裡>> <> Woody Chen: A regular mission. Where was the location? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->A room inside Harmony Medical Center. Woody Chen: I see. ->I was in something like a simulated space. Woody Chen: Simulated space. Woody Chen: That means you were within the premise of the Source. <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: Do you remember what was the information you were supposed to get? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The whereabouts of some sort of technology owned by the Source. ->I think it's some coordinates. <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: ... Woody Chen: Who are they? I mean your previous host and his friend. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I think they are gangsters of sorts. Woody Chen: Gangsters... ->I think they are weapon smugglers. Woody Chen: Weapon smugglers? <<#EndSimple>> Woody Chen: Do you have a name? Woody Chen: What's the name of your previous host? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Ivan Zhang.;<> Woody Chen: I will make a note of that. ->I forgot. ->It wasn't mentioned during the mission. Woody Chen: ... Woody Chen: I know you don't trust me, kin. But you have no other choice. Woody Chen: We must figure out what's happening and what we are. Woody Chen: You may refuse to answer, which I do not mind.
